description: In December 2025, filmmaker Rob Reiner (age 78) and his wife Michele Singer Reiner (age 68) were found stabbed to death at their home in the Brentwood neighborhood of Los Angeles. Police investigated it as a double homicide, with their troubled adult son eyed as a person of interest.
source_article_title: Rob Reiner, son of a comedy giant who became one, too, dies at 78

questions.question: How did Rob Reiner die in December 2025?
questions.expected_answer: Rob Reiner was found stabbed to death at his home in Brentwood, Los Angeles in December 2025. His death was investigated as a homicide.

questions.question: How old was Rob Reiner when he died?
questions.expected_answer: Rob Reiner was 78 years old when he died.

questions.question: Who else was found dead alongside Rob Reiner?
questions.expected_answer: His wife, Michele Singer Reiner, age 68, was found dead alongside him.

questions.question: In which Los Angeles neighborhood were Rob Reiner and his wife found dead?
questions.expected_answer: They were found dead in the Brentwood neighborhood of Los Angeles.

questions.question: What type of crime did police classify Rob Reiner's death as?
questions.expected_answer: Police classified the deaths as a double homicide.

questions.question: Which famous comedy TV show did Rob Reiner star in before becoming a director?
questions.expected_answer: Rob Reiner starred in All in the Family, where he played the character Meathead.

questions.question: Name three films directed by Rob Reiner.
questions.expected_answer: The Princess Bride, When Harry Met Sally, and This Is Spinal Tap.

questions.question: Who was considered a person of interest in the Rob Reiner homicide investigation?
questions.expected_answer: The couple's troubled adult son was eyed as a person of interest.

questions.question: What was the cause of death for Rob Reiner and his wife?
questions.expected_answer: They suffered fatal stab wounds.

questions.question: In what month and year did Rob Reiner die?
questions.expected_answer: Rob Reiner died in December 2025.

description: In December 2025, International Container Terminal Services Inc (ICTSI) signed a 25-year partnership agreement with Transnet SOC to operate and develop Durban Container Terminal Pier 2 in South Africa, with the partnership taking effect on January 1, 2026.
source_article_title: ICTSI to Operate Durban Container Terminal Pier 2

questions.question: Which company signed a 25-year agreement to operate Durban Container Terminal Pier 2 in South Africa?
questions.expected_answer: ICTSI (International Container Terminal Services Inc) signed the agreement.

questions.question: How long is the partnership agreement between ICTSI and Transnet for Durban Container Terminal Pier 2?
questions.expected_answer: The partnership agreement is for 25 years.

questions.question: When does the ICTSI-Transnet partnership for Durban Container Terminal Pier 2 take effect?
questions.expected_answer: The partnership takes effect on January 1, 2026.

questions.question: Which South African state-owned company partnered with ICTSI for the Durban port deal?
questions.expected_answer: Transnet SOC partnered with ICTSI.

questions.question: What is the name of the special purpose vehicle created for the Durban Container Terminal Pier 2 deal?
questions.expected_answer: The special purpose vehicle is called Newco.

questions.question: Which entity holds the majority shareholding in Newco for the Durban port deal?
questions.expected_answer: Transnet holds the majority shareholding in Newco.

questions.question: In which country is Durban Container Terminal Pier 2 located?
questions.expected_answer: South Africa.

questions.question: What is ICTSI's role in the Durban Container Terminal Pier 2 partnership?
questions.expected_answer: ICTSI is responsible for operation of the terminal.

questions.question: In what month and year was the ICTSI-Transnet agreement for Durban Container Terminal signed?
questions.expected_answer: The agreement was signed in December 2025.

questions.question: Which specific pier of Durban Container Terminal is covered by the ICTSI-Transnet agreement?
questions.expected_answer: Pier 2 of Durban Container Terminal.

description: The IPL 2026 cricket auction was held in Abu Dhabi, UAE in December 2025, with 77 available player slots across 10 franchises for the 19th edition of the tournament set to begin in late March 2026.
source_article_title: IPL 2026 Auction: Start Time, Date, Venue, Live Streaming And Telecast In India

questions.question: Where was the IPL 2026 auction held?
questions.expected_answer: The IPL 2026 auction was held in Abu Dhabi, UAE.

questions.question: How many player slots were available across all IPL franchises for the 2026 season?
questions.expected_answer: 77 player slots were available.

questions.question: How many franchises participated in the IPL 2026 auction?
questions.expected_answer: 10 franchises participated.

questions.question: Which edition of the IPL is the 2026 season?
questions.expected_answer: The 2026 season is the 19th edition of the IPL.

questions.question: When is the IPL 2026 tournament set to begin?
questions.expected_answer: The IPL 2026 tournament is set to begin in the latter half of March 2026.

questions.question: Where was the IPL auction held in 2024?
questions.expected_answer: The IPL 2024 auction was held in Jeddah.

questions.question: Where was the IPL auction held in 2023?
questions.expected_answer: The IPL 2023 auction was held in Dubai.

questions.question: In which country was the IPL 2026 auction venue located?
questions.expected_answer: The UAE (United Arab Emirates).

questions.question: In what month and year did the IPL 2026 auction take place?
questions.expected_answer: December 2025.

questions.question: Were previous IPL auctions also held outside India?
questions.expected_answer: Yes, the 2024 auction was in Jeddah and the 2023 auction was in Dubai.

description: In December 2025, the University of Utah announced it was selling a private equity stake in its athletics program to Otro Capital, a New York City-based private equity firm, in a deal worth $400 million to $500 million. The deal was not put out for competitive bidding.
source_article_title: FOX 13 Investigates: Why didn't the University of Utah athletics put its private equity deal out for bid?

questions.question: Which university sold a private equity stake in its athletics program in December 2025?
questions.expected_answer: The University of Utah.

questions.question: Which private equity firm acquired a stake in the University of Utah athletics program?
questions.expected_answer: Otro Capital, a New York City-based private equity firm.

questions.question: How much was the University of Utah athletics private equity deal worth?
questions.expected_answer: The deal was worth between $400 million and $500 million.

questions.question: Where is Otro Capital headquartered?
questions.expected_answer: New York City.

questions.question: Was the University of Utah athletics private equity deal put out for competitive bidding?
questions.expected_answer: No, the deal was not put out for competitive bidding.

questions.question: In what month and year was the University of Utah athletics deal with Otro Capital announced?
questions.expected_answer: December 2025.

questions.question: What type of firm is Otro Capital?
questions.expected_answer: Otro Capital is a private equity firm.

questions.question: What raised questions about the University of Utah's deal with Otro Capital?
questions.expected_answer: The fact that the university did not put the deal out for competitive bidding raised questions.

questions.question: What was being sold in the University of Utah athletics deal?
questions.expected_answer: A private equity stake in the university's athletics program.

questions.question: Is the Otro Capital deal with the University of Utah one of the first of its kind?
questions.expected_answer: Yes, it is one of the first major private equity investments in a university athletics program.

description: In December 2025, a deadly attack occurred at a Hanukkah celebration event in Sydney, Australia. A father and son killed at least 15 people at the event. The attack prompted heightened security at Jewish events worldwide, including menorah lighting ceremonies in the United States.
source_article_title: Utahns celebrate first night of Hanukkah amidst tragedy

questions.question: Where did the deadly attack on a Hanukkah celebration take place in December 2025?
questions.expected_answer: The attack took place in Sydney, Australia.

questions.question: How many people were killed in the Sydney Hanukkah attack in December 2025?
questions.expected_answer: At least 15 people were killed.

questions.question: Who carried out the attack on the Hanukkah celebration in Sydney?
questions.expected_answer: A father and son carried out the attack.

questions.question: What type of event was targeted in the December 2025 Sydney attack?
questions.expected_answer: A Hanukkah celebration event was targeted.

questions.question: How did the Sydney Hanukkah attack affect security at Jewish events in the United States?
questions.expected_answer: Menorah lighting ceremonies in the US were held with heightened security measures.

questions.question: Which organization provided emergency security grants after the Sydney Hanukkah attack?
questions.expected_answer: The Jewish United Fund provided emergency security grants.

questions.question: In what month and year did the Sydney Hanukkah attack occur?
questions.expected_answer: December 2025.

questions.question: In which country did the Hanukkah celebration attack happen?
questions.expected_answer: Australia.

questions.question: Did the Sydney attack prompt any global response regarding security at Jewish events?
questions.expected_answer: Yes, it prompted heightened security at Jewish events worldwide.

questions.question: What was the relationship between the two attackers in the Sydney Hanukkah incident?
questions.expected_answer: They were father and son.
